What are the legal requirements for amending authorisation decisions issued under Council Directive 81/851/EEC, as amended by subsequent directives, in light of Article 9 thereof? What procedures does the designated competent authority follow to ensure compliance with this Regulation and make necessary adjustments to these decisions?

original_question: Can it be determined from the excerpt whether any rice products were ever authorised for placement on the market in the European Union?
enhanced_question: Does the provided text evidence that any rice product has been granted authorisation for its placement on the market within the scope of this Regulation, as defined by Article 3(1) thereof, and if so, what specific provisions or directives have been implemented by the competent authority in Member States to regulate such authorisations?
variants: Does the provided text indicate that any rice product has obtained formal approval for its sale within the boundaries of this Regulation's scope, as outlined in Article 3(1)?

Are there any records or documentation suggesting that a rice product has been officially sanctioned for distribution across Member States under the terms of this Regulation? If so, what specific rules or guidelines have been established by the relevant authorities to govern such authorizations?

original_question: What is the maximum unit price that can be displayed on an electronic weighing scale for use in the retail trade, as specified in this Regulation?
enhanced_question: What is the maximum unit price that may be displayed on an electronic weighing scale intended for use in the retail trade, pursuant to Article 12(3) of this Regulation, and what are the criteria by which such prices shall be determined?
variants: Under Article 12(3) of this Regulation, what is the maximum unit price limit that can be displayed on a retail weighing scale, and what factors should be considered when setting these prices?

What is the permissible maximum value for the display of unit prices on an electronic weighing scale used in commercial transactions, as specified in Article 12(3)? What are the guidelines governing the calculation of such prices?

original_question: What is the time frame for notifying the Commission and the Member States of a change in the vaccination policy against a specified disease?
enhanced_question: What is the applicable timeframe stipulated by this Regulation for notification to both the European Commission and all Member States of any material amendments to the vaccination policy targeting a specific communicable disease, as per Article 16(2) of the [Regulation], and what are the specific procedural requirements and deadlines for such notifications?
variants: What is the applicable notification period stipulated by this Regulation for both the European Commission and all Member States regarding material amendments to the vaccination policy targeting a specific communicable disease, as per Article 16(2) of the [Regulation]? What are the procedural requirements and deadlines for such notifications?

To what extent does this Regulation impose obligations on the European Commission and all Member States to receive notification of material amendments to the vaccination policy targeting a specific communicable disease within a specified timeframe, as set out in Article 16(2) of the [Regulation]? What are the specific requirements and deadlines for such notifications?

original_question: What is the purpose of granting an exemption under this Regulation, according to point 59?
enhanced_question: What is the purpose of granting an exemption pursuant to Article [insert article number], as specified in point 59 of this Regulation, and what are the conditions and criteria that must be met by the competent authority in order to grant such an exemption?
variants: Under what circumstances can a competent authority invoke Article [insert article number] to justify an exemption under point 59 of this Regulation, and what specific requirements or thresholds must be satisfied in order for such an exemption to be deemed lawful?

What are the conditions and criteria that the competent authority must fulfill in order to grant an exemption pursuant to Article [insert article number], as specified in point 59 of this Regulation, and what is the purpose of such exemptions in the context of EU law?

original_question: Is the maximum age limit for receiving the processing premium 10 or 20 days?
enhanced_question: Does this Regulation specify whether the maximum age limit for receiving the processing premium is ten days or twenty days, and if so, what is the relevant provision or Article that governs this limitation, as interpreted by the competent authority in accordance with EU law?
variants: Does the Regulation clarify whether the maximum age limit for receiving the processing premium is indeed 10 days or 20 days, and if so, which specific article or provision governs this limitation as interpreted by the relevant authority?

What EU legal framework provision applies to determine the applicable age limit for receiving the processing premium, namely 10 days or 20 days, and what is the relevant competent authority's interpretation of this provision in accordance with EU law?

original_question: What is the purpose of evaluating and systematically monitoring a project, as stated in Article 792/93?
enhanced_question: What is the purpose of conducting regular evaluations and systematic monitoring of a project pursuant to Article 792/93 of this Regulation, and what are the specific requirements and obligations imposed on Member States and undertakings by virtue of such evaluations and monitoring?
variants: Under Article 792/93 of this Regulation, what is the intended outcome of conducting regular assessments and oversight of a project, and what are the corresponding duties and responsibilities that fall to EU member states and undertakings in fulfilling these obligations?

original_question: What was the specific period during which the Protocol defining fishing opportunities and financial contributions was approved by the EU?

original_question: What is the effective date for this Regulation to apply, as stated in Article 2?

original_question: What is the percentage by which customs duty is reduced for products originating from ACP/OCT countries?

variants: Under what percentage threshold does customs duty on goods originating from countries participating in the Agence de Coopération au Développement Economique (ACDE) or Organisation des États du Comité du Sud (OCT) scheme, as specified in Article 8(1)(a), apply, and which specific provisions regulate their application?
